title: Oyaa Oyaa Lyrics Kaashmora
stanzas:
Kaashmora Oyaa Oyaa Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Kalpana Raghavendar
Lyrics: Lalithanand

mannaa nee madhi
kaana vaaraayo
en marupakkam
paarthenna aavaayo

neel koondhal
poovindri vaada
adhil nee vandhu
unmoochai sooda

kaiyayi kaiyyaal
nee killa.
meiyai meiyaal
naan alla.
aaha aasai neela

achcham naanam
naan kolla.
uchcham endru
nee thulla.
theera yaekkan
theera

murasulla manjam
en nenjam
adhil arasey nee
kanmoodu konjam

koththi kollum
en paarvai
kuththi thallum
un paarvai
yaaro yaar
velluvaaro

emmai konjam
un kaamam
ummai minjum
en yaamam
yaaro yaar
minjuvaaro

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Oyaa Oyaa?

The song Oyaa Oyaa conveys a lively and energetic vibe, celebrating joy and excitement.

What is the plot context of the movie Kaashmora?

Kaashmora is a fantasy thriller that intertwines elements of comedy and horror, showcasing the adventures of its titular character.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by the talented Kalpana Raghavendar.

Who composed the music for Oyaa Oyaa?

The music for Oyaa Oyaa was composed by Santhosh Narayanan.

When was the song released?

The song was released on October 8, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oyaa Oyaa, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the celebratory spirit of Kaashmora. The lively beats and catchy lyrics invite listeners to dance and revel in joy. This track encapsulates the essence of fun and excitement, making it perfect for festive occasions. With its upbeat tempo, it evokes feelings of happiness and celebration, resonating with audiences looking for a lively anthem.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oyaa Oyaa from Kaashmora is an electrifying track that perfectly captures the vibrant energy of celebration. With Kalpana Raghavendar's dynamic vocals and Santhosh Narayanan's infectious beats, this song is bound to get you on your feet. Dive into the rhythm and let the magic of this collaboration sweep you away!
stanzaMeanings: Oyaa oyaa oyaa, the fiery beauty is also an illusion.
Will you come to see the world, my reflection? Will you come to my side?
Don't look at the corners, will you see the desires in a woman's heart?
Oyaa oyaa oyaa, the fiery beauty is also an illusion.
You are the melody, you are my shadow, where are you going?
Without the blue flower, you come and ignite your essence.
Unseen flames burn in the heart, a hidden fire with speed.
With your hand in mine, you are not a lie. I am not false. Oh, the desire is blue.
Fear and shame, I won't take. You call it height. Seek the end.
Oyaa oyaa oyaa, the fiery beauty is also an illusion.
Like a lesson, my eyes won't let your touch come near.
With a drumbeat, my heart beats. You are the king, look at it a little.
Don't let the night end. Why do you come at dawn?
My gaze will pierce you, your gaze will push me away. Who will win?
Let me take a little of your desire, who will win over my night?
Oyaa oyaa oyaa, the fiery beauty is also an illusion.
